title: Scheduler
subtitle: A Calendar Based Scheduling App
description: A system that helps people book meetings without back-and-forth messages. A user can set their available times and share a personal booking link. Anyone can open that link, pick a suitable time, and schedule a meeting instantly.

title: AI Feedback
subtitle: AI-Powered Feedback Platform
description: A feedback web app built with Next.js and TypeScript, enabling users to generate and share unique feedback URLs. Integrated AI-powered feedback generation to improve user interaction and engagement.

title: TaskFlow
subtitle: Smart Task Management Platform
description: A full-stack task management application with CRUD operations, dark/light theme support, pagination, search & filters and real-time task tracking. Features a public dashboard preview, analytics dashboard and secure authentication with refresh token rotation.

title: Study Planner
subtitle: Planning & Productivity Web App
description: A calm and focused study planning application that helps students organize study sessions, track progress, manage schedules and maintain study streaks.

title: AI Web Scraper
subtitle: LLM-Powered Web Scraping Tool
description: An AI-powered web scraping platform that combines Selenium browser automation, Bright Data cloud scraping, BeautifulSoup parsing, and Ollama LLM integration to extract structured information from websites using natural language prompts.

title: Trading Bot
subtitle: CLI Crypto Trading Bot
description: A Python CLI trading bot for Binance Futures Testnet supporting Market, Limit and Stop-Limit orders with input validation, structured logging and environment-based configuration.

title: RAG PDF System
subtitle: Retrieval-Augmented Pipeline
description: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system that processes PDFs, generates embeddings, stores vectors in Qdrant, retrieves relevant chunks through similarity search and generates grounded answers using OpenAI models and LangChain.

title: Chat App
subtitle: Real-Time MERN Chat Application
description: Real-time chat application with individual and group chat functionality. Supports group creation, member management, and admin-based permissions using Socket.io.

title: FAST API
subtitle: Product Management API
description: A REST API built with FastAPI and PostgreSQL for managing products with full CRUD functionality, request validation using Pydantic, SQLAlchemy ORM integration, automatic Swagger documentation and CORS support for frontend integration.

title: iPhone 13 Web
subtitle: 3D Product Showcase Website
description: Interactive iPhone 13 showcase website featuring immersive 3D animations, GSAP-powered transitions, and detailed product presentation for an engaging user experience.

title: Flight Info
subtitle: Flight Search Web App
description: A Next.js application that allows users to search and view flight details. Built as a freelance assessment project showcasing TypeScript and shadcn/ui expertise.

title: Travel-advisor
subtitle: Travel Discovery Platform
description: Travel companion platform for discovering nearby hotels, restaurants, and destinations using maps and location-based APIs for seamless travel planning.

title: Simon Game
subtitle: JavaScript Memory Game
description: Classic Simon memory game built with JavaScript where players repeat color patterns to improve memory skills. Helped strengthen core JavaScript concepts.
